events.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
events.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez, known for hits like 'Jenny from the Block' and 'On the Floor', celebrates her 57th birthday today.

angles.name: J.Lo's influence
angles.copy: From the Bronx to global icon, J.Lo has been breaking barriers and topping charts for decades. What's your favourite J.Lo track to get you on the dancefloor?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Ageless Rocker
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still got the moves! Happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. What's your ultimate Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched, changing music forever
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV launched in the US, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' famously being the first music video ever aired.

angles.name: The Day The Music Changed
angles.copy: Remember when music videos were a brand new thing? Forty-five years ago, MTV launched and kicked it all off with The Buggles. Did video really kill the radio star?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' anniversary
events.blurb: Oasis' iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was released on August 29, 1994, propelling the Manchester band to stardom.

angles.name: Definitely a Classic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of British music. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969, featuring iconic acts and drawing over 400,000 people.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since half a million people gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. Which legendary performance do you wish you'd seen?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 this year. He passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, who left us on this day in 1977. His music and charisma continue to captivate generations. What's your go-to Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Remembering guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84 this year. He passed away on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: The world lost a true guitar icon on this day. Remembering Jimi Hendrix, whose innovative sound continues to inspire. Which Hendrix riff is your favourite?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', was released in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring iconic tracks like 'Come Together' and 'Here Comes the Sun'.

angles.name: That Iconic Cover
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road' and arguably the most famous album cover of all time. What's your standout track from the Fab Four's masterpiece?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon, still delivering those powerful vocals. What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The outspoken and iconic former Oasis frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that undeniable swagger. What's your favourite Liam moment, solo or Oasis?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' UK single re-release anniversary
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was re-released as a single in the UK on October 24, 1975, to coincide with his 'Shaved Fish' compilation album. The original US single was released on October 11, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 'Imagine all the people living life in peace...' John Lennon's powerful message still resonates today. What does 'Imagine' mean to you?

events.title: Anniversary of the first iPod's launch
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the revolutionary first iPod on October 23, 2001, promising '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changing how we listen to music forever.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Remember the world before the iPod? Twenty-five years ago, Apple introduced a game-changer that put a thousand songs in your pocket. Did you have one of the originals?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the release of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', on October 5, 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Sixty-four years since 007 first hit the big screen in 'Dr. No'. Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the ultimate Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering The Beatles legend John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Remembering John
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we're remembering the iconic John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire generations. What's your favourite Lennon song?

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian, actor, and writer, John Cleese, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday today.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the utterly brilliant John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty Towers, he's given us endless laughs. What's your favourite John Cleese moment?

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' self-titled double album, famously known as 'The White Album', was released on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: The White Album Turns
angles.copy: Fifty-eight years since The Beatles delivered their eclectic 'White Album'. A double LP packed with diverse tracks. Which song is your hidden gem from it?
